name: Equinox Gold Corp.
description: Equinox Gold is a Canadian mid-tier gold producer with eight producing mines across the Americas. Cornerstone assets include the Greenstone Gold Mine in Ontario and the Valentine Gold Mine in Newfoundland & Labrador, which poured first gold in late 2025. The company also operates mines in California, Mexico, and Brazil, with ongoing expansion projects at Castle Mountain and Los Filos.
